Aristanemi

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Gommateshwara Statue at Shravanabelagola
by Aristanemi
Ganga dynasty · 983 CE · Karnataka
A 17-meter monolithic nude of the Jain ascetic Bahubali, absorbed in meditation so deep that vines have grown up his legs. Every twelve years, pilgrims anoint the figure with milk, turmeric, and sandalwood in the Mahamastakabhisheka festival.
←Bartolommeo da Arezzo Caur, Arpana→
